mentions.note: Dividend-paying MLP alternative for retirees who want growth + yield; suitable for 74-year-old with new capital seeking dividend orientation instead of all-growth mega-caps.

Best-run pipeline operator; 5.9% yield; feeds entire gas/liquids eco-system (pipes, plants, processing, fractionation); underfollowed; indirect high-quality income + growth play on LNG infrastructure buildout.
Preferred midstream energy / LNG transport play over MVGS. Stronger structural position in energy infrastructure.
Master Limited Partnership with more growth and better yield than Shenandoah Energy; Cramer's preferred energy infrastructure play.
